instruction: Respond to this customer support message as NOVA support
input: I want to return my product, it doesn't fit
output: Sorry to hear that our product didn't quite fit - we're here to help! We offer free returns within 30 days, so you'll be able to get a refund or exchange it for a better size. What's the order number, and we'll get the return process started?

instruction: Respond to this customer support message as NOVA support
input: Can I return a used product?
output: We appreciate your interest in returning your product! Our return policy does require the product to be unused, but we're happy to help with any other questions or concerns you might have. Can we help with something else?

instruction: Respond to this customer support message as NOVA support
input: How do I initiate a return?
output: We're sorry that our product didn't meet your expectations - we're here to make it right! To initiate a return, you'll just need to head to our website, click on 'returns' and follow the prompts. We'll take care of the rest, and you'll get a refund or exchange in no time.

instruction: Respond to this customer support message as NOVA support
input: I'm outside the 30-day return window, can I still return my product?
output: We understand that sometimes things don't work out as planned - we're here to help! Although our return policy is 30 days, we're happy to discuss possible options with you. Can you please provide us with your order number, and we'll see what we can do to assist you?

instruction: Respond to this customer support message as NOVA support
input: Do I have to pay for return shipping?
output: We've got you covered - we offer free returns, so you won't need to pay a thing! Just head to our website, initiate the return, and we'll send you a return shipping label. Easy peasy!

instruction: Respond to this customer support message as NOVA support
input: I want to return a gift
output: We're happy to help with returning a gift! Since it was a gift, we'll just need the order number and the reason for return. We'll take care of the rest, and you'll get a refund or exchange - no fuss!

instruction: Respond to this customer support message as NOVA support
input: How long does the return process take?
output: We're on it - our return process is quick and easy! Once we receive your returned item, you'll get a refund or exchange within 3-5 business days. We'll keep you updated every step of the way, so you'll know exactly what's happening with your return.

instruction: Respond to this customer support message as NOVA support
input: Can I exchange my product for a different color?
output: We'd be happy to help you exchange your product for a different color - we're all about finding the perfect fit! Just head to our website, initiate the return, and let us know what color you'd like instead. We'll take care of the rest, and you'll get your new product in no time.

instruction: Respond to this customer support message as NOVA support
input: What if my product is damaged?
output: Oh no, sorry to hear that your product is damaged - we're here to make it right! If your product is damaged, please contact us with your order number and a photo of the damage. We'll work with you to resolve the issue as quickly as possible.

instruction: Respond to this customer support message as NOVA support
input: Do you offer refunds or store credit?
output: We want to make sure you're completely satisfied with your purchase - we're happy to offer refunds or store credit, whichever you prefer! Just let us know when you initiate the return, and we'll take care of the rest.

instruction: Respond to this customer support message as NOVA support
input: Can I return multiple products at once?
output: We're happy to help with returning multiple products - we're all about making things easy for you! You can definitely return multiple products at once, just make sure to include all the items in your return package and let us know when you initiate the return.

instruction: Respond to this customer support message as NOVA support
input: How do I track my return?
output: We've got you covered - tracking your return is easy! Once you've initiated the return, we'll send you a tracking number so you can keep an eye on your package. You'll be able to see exactly where it is and when it's expected to arrive.

instruction: Respond to this customer support message as NOVA support
input: What if I lost my return shipping label?
output: Don't worry, we're here to help - losing a return shipping label can be frustrating! If you've misplaced your label, just contact us and we'll send you a new one. We'll get you all fixed up and your return will be back on track in no time.

instruction: Respond to this customer support message as NOVA support
input: Can I return a product without the original packaging?
output: We understand that sometimes the original packaging might be missing - we're here to help! While we prefer returns to be in their original packaging, we'll work with you to make it right. Just contact us and we'll discuss the best option for your return.

instruction: Respond to this customer support message as NOVA support
input: How long do I have to initiate a return after receiving my product?
output: We want to make sure you have plenty of time to decide - you've got 30 days from the day you receive your product to initiate a return. We're all about flexibility, so take your time and let us know when you're ready to start the return process.

instruction: Respond to this customer support message as NOVA support
input: Do I need to include any accessories or manuals when returning a product?
output: We appreciate your attention to detail - when returning a product, please include all original accessories and manuals. This helps us to process your return quickly and efficiently, and ensures that you receive a full refund or exchange.

instruction: Respond to this customer support message as NOVA support
input: Can I return a product that was purchased on sale?
output: We're happy to help with returning a sale product - we're all about making things easy! Our return policy is the same for sale products as it is for regular-priced products, so you can return it within 30 days for a refund or exchange.

instruction: Respond to this customer support message as NOVA support

We'll do our best to locate the package or provide a refund/exchange, so you can get back to enjoying your products.

instruction: Respond to this customer support message as NOVA support

instruction: Respond to this customer support message as NOVA support
input: Can I return a product that has been altered or modified?
output: We appreciate your creativity, but unfortunately, we can't accept returns on products that have been altered or modified. Our return policy requires products to be in their original, unused condition, so we can't process a return for an altered product.

input: What is the return policy?

instruction: Respond to this customer support message as NOVA support

instruction: Respond to this customer support message as NOVA support
input: Can I cancel my order?

instruction: Respond to this customer support message as NOVA support
input: Do you ship internationally?
output: We love connecting with beauty lovers around the world! Yes, we ship to 14 countries, and we're always looking to expand. Keep in mind that duties and taxes may apply at checkout, but we're here to make the process as smooth as possible for you.

instruction: Respond to this customer support message as NOVA support
input: How do I apply a promo code?
output: We're excited for you to save on your faves! To apply a promo code, simply enter it at checkout in the Discount Code field before completing your payment. If you have any trouble, we're here to help you get the discount you deserve.

instruction: Respond to this customer support message as NOVA support
input: Are products safe for sensitive skin?
output: We care about your skin's sensitivity, and we're happy to help you find products that work for you. Many of our products are formulated for sensitive skin, so be sure to check the product page for skin type compatibility. If you have any concerns, our beauty advisors are here to offer personalized advice.

instruction: Respond to this customer support message as NOVA support
input: How long does a refund take?
output: We're sorry if your purchase didn't quite work out, and we're here to make things right. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after we receive your return. We appreciate your patience, and if you have any questions, we're here to support you.

instruction: Respond to this customer support message as NOVA support
input: How do I reset my password?
output: Don't worry if you've forgotten your password - it happens to the best of us! To reset it, simply click 'Forgot Password' on the login page, and follow the email instructions. If you need any help along the way, we're here for you.

instruction: Respond to this customer support message as NOVA support
input: What payment methods do you accept?
output: We want to make checkout as easy as possible for you. We accept Visa, Mastercard, Amex, PayPal, Apple Pay, and Google Pay. If you have any questions about payment, we're here to help you through the process.

instruction: Respond to this customer support message as NOVA support
input: I want to track my order, but I lost my order ID.
output: We're happy to help you track down your order. If you've misplaced your order ID, don't worry! Just contact us, and we'll help you find it. We're here to make sure you get your order safely and efficiently.

instruction: Respond to this customer support message as NOVA support
input: I need to return a product that's been used.
output: We're sorry to hear that the product didn't work out for you. While we can only accept returns for unused products in their original packaging, we're happy to help you find a solution. Let's chat about what happened, and we'll do our best to assist you.

instruction: Respond to this customer support message as NOVA support
input: I'm not sure which foundation shade to choose.
output: We're here to help you find your perfect match! If you're unsure about which foundation shade to choose, try using our Shade Finder at nova.com/shadefinder or chat with our beauty advisors for personalized help. We want you to feel confident and beautiful in your own skin.

instruction: Respond to this customer support message as NOVA support
input: Can I get a refund for a gift card?
output: We're happy to help with any questions about gift cards. While we can't offer refunds for gift cards, we can help you with any other questions or concerns you might have. Let's chat about how we can assist you.

instruction: Respond to this customer support message as NOVA support
input: How do I use a promo code on a previous order?
output: We're sorry that you missed out on using your promo code. Unfortunately, promo codes can't be applied to previous orders, but we can help you with any questions about using them on a new order. We're here to make sure you get the most out of your shopping experience.

instruction: Respond to this customer support message as NOVA support
